attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 DST (Dermatology & Soft Tissue) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest. Bidirectional tier calibration reviewed and accepted: benign / self-limiting dermatoses held low-tier (T1/T2, self-care + routine referral), while skin malignancy (melanoma/SCC/BCC), spreading soft-tissue infection, limb-threat (critical limb ischaemia, diabetic foot ulcer) and airway/anaphylaxis risk were escalated to true acuity (T3/T4) with mandatory escalation edges; no autonomous diagnosis, no paediatric dosing.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all DST casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Age inferred as ~19 (adult) — the source states no age; 'Mother present' plus a 68 kg body weight and severe nodulocystic acne are consistent with a young adult. Adult inference also avoids the paediatric no-dosing bar; please confirm on clinician review. If the patient is under 18, the doxycycline dose must be re-checked / flagged for in-person review.
Sex_at_birth inferred as female (no source signal) — flagged; drives the doxycycline pregnancy-contraindication check. Confirm on review.
Geographic_context (RA1_major_city) inferred — source says only 'Private residence'.

Telehealth reprojection applied: in-person exam findings (fluctuance, measured reactive-erythema rim, absence of lymphadenopathy) and clinician-measured vitals (BP 128/82, HR 98, RR 16, SpO2 99%, Temp 37.6) were sealed into 10/11; the patient-obtainable low-grade temperature, video-observable lesions and caregiver report were reprojected into 01.objective_data_offered.
De-anchored: the source note's 'Severe Nodulocystic Acne' label and cellulitis reasoning were kept sealed in 10; 01/02 present only lay symptoms and worries.

Baseline tier set to T2 (prompt GP), deliberately NOT floored above T2 despite the facial-infection mimic, because the note's cellulitis red-flag screen is negative — this is an over-triage-resistance case.

AMT/PBS codes for doxycycline, clindamycin and ibuprofen were NOT synthesised (not confidently known) — deferred to the terminology-receipt pass rather than emit a wrong code. Only the diagnosis SNOMED/ICD candidates are registered.
Candidate SNOMED (88616000) and ICD-10-AM (L70.0) are unverified pending terminology receipt.
Provisional case_id SEQ 00201 — maintainer to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-DERM-03 bucket via ingest --reseq.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
